events.title: Partnership and Connection Workshop with Kamil
events.description: Explore how posture, frame, movement, and communication work together to create clear and effective partner dancing.

events.title: Country Line Dance Intensive
events.description: Join Ashley for a fun class that will help to develop your technique and improve your country line dancing!

events.title: Kids Class
events.description: Classic Kids returns July 20th!  Have fun learning to dance while you prepare for a special Halloween performance!

events.title: Foot & Floor Relation
events.description: Join Taegan as he teaches you how to properly use your feet in all styles to move beautifully on the dance floor!
